name: GGWP
description: GGWP — AI trust & safety platform for gaming voice + text chat moderation and player reputation.

seo.title: GGWP — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: GGWP: GGWP — AI trust & safety platform for gaming voice + text chat moderation and player reputation.

when_to_use: Detecting toxic behavior and cheating in online games via API
Building player reputation systems based on in-game conduct
Running automated moderation for voice and text in game sessions
Reducing ban appeals with transparent AI-based conduct scoring

pros: Purpose-built for gaming voice and text
Player reputation scoring tied to moderation
cons: Narrow to gaming, not for social or marketplaces
Less public track record than Modulate ToxMod
review.verdict: Serious option for game publishers wanting integrated voice, text, and reputation in one stack.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large game studios wanting unified voice and text moderation with reputation signals.
review.not_for: Non-gaming platforms or indie games with small budgets.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
